---
title: "Essay on Shiny Live"
author: "Harrison Gan"
format: html
---

## What is Shinylive?

Shinylive is a way to run Shiny-style applications directly in a web browser without needing a traditional server.

## How Shinylive Differs from Shiny Apps

Traditional Shiny apps usually need a server to run. Shinylive allows apps to run in the browser itself, which makes sharing and deployment easier.

## Pros of Shinylive

-   No server required
-   Easier to publish and share
-   Good for lightweight projects and demonstrations

## Cons of Shinylive

-   Not ideal for very large or complex apps
-   Still more limited than full Shiny in some cases

## Comparison with Traditional Shiny

Traditional Shiny is better for larger, more advanced applications. Shinylive is better when you want something simple, portable, and easy to publish.

## Conclusion

Shinylive is a useful modern alternative to traditional Shiny for smaller interactive apps, especially when easy deployment is important.
